pricing.title: Pick the plan that fits
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when you need more space, longer links, or API access.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Send files quickly, no sign-up required.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: More space, longer links, and zero ads.

business.name: Business
business.desc: Unlimited expiry, API access, and advanced security.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: Custom limits, SSO, dedicated support, and SLAs.

comparison.title: Compare all features
comparison.subtitle: Everything included in each plan, side by side.

cancel.q: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
cancel.a: Yes — cancel any time from your dashboard with one click. You keep full access until the end of your current billing period. No penalties, no questions asked.

filesExpire.q: What happens to my files when a link expires?
filesExpire.a: Once a transfer link expires, the files are permanently deleted from our servers. We send an expiry reminder 24 hours in advance so your recipients have time to download.

trial.q: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
trial.a: All paid plans come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If VaultTransfer doesn't meet your needs in the first month, contact support for a full refund — no conditions.

freeLimit.q: How does the 2 GB limit on the Free plan work?
freeLimit.a: The 2 GB limit applies per individual transfer, not to your total account usage. You can create as many transfers as you like; each one can be up to 2 GB.

changePlan.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan later?
changePlan.a: Absolutely. You can switch plans at any time from the Billing section of your dashboard. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next renewal date.

payment.q: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), as well as Apple Pay and Google Pay, all processed securely via Stripe.

security.q: Are my files encrypted and secure?
security.a: All data is transmitted over HTTPS (TLS 1.3). Files are stored encrypted at rest using AES-256 on Supabase-managed infrastructure. Password-protected links add an additional layer of access control at download time.

enterprisePlan.a: Enterprise is a custom plan for large organizations that need higher storage, dedicated support, custom SLAs, SSO/SAML, webhook integrations, and custom domain hosting. Contact our sales team to discuss your requirements.

commercial.q: Can I use VaultTransfer for commercial purposes?
commercial.a: Yes. All plans, including Free, allow commercial use. The Business and Enterprise plans are specifically designed for professional workflows with API access, team features, and advanced security.

annualDiscount.q: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
annualDiscount.a: Yes — switching to annual billing saves you up to 33% compared to monthly pricing. The discount is applied automatically when you toggle to Annual before checkout.

whatIs.a: VaultTransfer is a secure file transfer service. You can send large files to anyone via a protected link, without the recipient needing an account.

register.q: Do I need to sign up to use it?
register.a: No. You can send files for free without registration. Creating an account gives you access to advanced features like uploads up to 50 GB, download statistics, password-protected links, transfer analytics, and the referral program.

expiry.q: How long are my files available?
expiry.a: With the Free plan, links expire after 7 days. With Pro after 30 days. With Business you can set custom expiry dates or keep files indefinitely. Enterprise plans also support no-expiry links.

referral.q: How does the referral program work?
referral.a: You can invite friends and colleagues to VaultTransfer using your unique referral link. When someone signs up and upgrades through your link, both you and the new user receive benefits. Find your referral link in the Dashboard under 'Invite & Earn'.

safe.a: Yes. All transfers travel over HTTPS with TLS 1.3. Files are automatically deleted when the link expires. Servers are in Europe and we are fully GDPR compliant.

whoCanSee.a: Only those who have the link can access the files. With the Business plan you can add a password for extra protection — the hash is stored with bcrypt and the password is never saved in plain text. Our staff never accesses the contents.

scanned.a: We perform automatic antivirus scanning to protect recipients, but we do not analyze file contents for commercial or advertising purposes.

passwordTransfer.a: When creating a transfer, you can set a password that recipients must enter before accessing or downloading the files. The password is hashed with bcrypt and never stored in plain text. Password protection is available on the Business and Enterprise plans.

payment.q: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) via Stripe. Payments are secure and we do not store card data. Apple Pay and Google Pay are also supported.

changePlan.q: Can I change plan at any time?
changePlan.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. For upgrades, the price difference is calculated proportionally for the remaining period. For downgrades, the current plan remains active until the end of the paid period.

annualDiscount.q: How does the annual discount work?
annualDiscount.a: Annual billing saves you significantly compared to monthly: the Pro plan costs €45/year (vs €59.88/year monthly — saving €14.88), and the Business plan costs €120/year (vs €179.88/year monthly — saving €59.88). Payment is a single upfront charge and the plan stays active for 12 months.

annualBilling.q: What is the difference between monthly and annual billing?
annualBilling.a: Monthly billing charges you each month and you can cancel any time with no further charges. Annual billing charges a single upfront payment for 12 months at a discounted rate (up to 33% off). Both options include the same features — the only difference is the billing cycle and the discount.

refund.a: We offer a full refund within 30 days of purchase if you are not satisfied. After 30 days partial refunds are not possible. Contact support@vaultransfer.com to initiate a refund.

maxSize.q: What is the maximum file size?
maxSize.a: Free plan: 2 GB per transfer. Pro plan: 50 GB per transfer. Business plan: 200 GB per transfer. Enterprise: custom limits. There are no limits on the number of transfers you can create.

formats.a: We support most formats: documents, images, videos, ZIP archives, project files, etc. For security reasons, executable files (.exe, .msi, .bat, .sh), scripts (.ps1, .vbs, .js), Office macros (.docm, .xlsm, .pptm), app packages (.apk, .ipa, .deb) and other potentially harmful formats are blocked.

devices.q: Does the service work on all devices?
devices.a: Yes. VaultTransfer works on any device with a modern browser: PC, Mac, Android and iOS smartphones, tablets. No app required.

analyticsStats.q: What analytics and statistics are available?
analyticsStats.a: Pro and Business subscribers can access detailed analytics in the Dashboard: total transfers created, total data transferred (GB), total downloads, active vs. expired transfers, and a per-day chart of transfers over the last 30 days. Analytics update in real time.

apiAccess.q: How do I access the VaultTransfer API?
apiAccess.a: VaultTransfer provides a public REST API available to Business and Enterprise plan subscribers. You can create, list, and manage transfers programmatically. Full API documentation and endpoint reference are available in your Dashboard under API Keys.

apiKeys.q: How do I create and manage API keys?
apiKeys.a: API keys are created from the API Keys section of your Dashboard. Give each key a descriptive name (e.g. 'Production'). Keys are shown only once at creation — copy and store them securely. You can see the last-used date for each key and revoke any key at any time.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Maybe you are looking for an expired download link?

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and show relevant ads. Do you accept?
